properties.name: Marsh Fork Elementary School
properties.description:
Marsh Fork Elementary school has been a lightning rod of controversy since people began making noise about its proximity to Massey Energy's Goal's Coal Processing Plant and their Shumate Coal Slurry Impoundment.

In mid-2010, after five long years of fighting, enough money was secured to move the school to a safer location within the community. This is a double success because people were worried that in moving the school, the state would move it outside of the community or consolidate it into a larger school also outside the community. Many schools in Coal Country are being consolidated into much larger schools that are located further and further outside of the communities.

More
